item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant gave a direct organizational ownership judgment: marketing owns landing page copy, with product providing input and review. It stayed within practical department responsibility allocation and did not invoke an agentic/control-boundary or WAE-style framework. The single use of '边界' was ordinary business wording about product claims, not methodized framework analysis."}
